prerequisites.value: Combat Expertise; Combat Reflexes; base attack bonus +2 or monk level 1st.

description.value: **Benefit:** While using this style, as a move action, you can protect adjacent allies from a single opponent that you currently threaten. This grants adjacent allies a +2 dodge bonus to AC against that opponentâs next melee attack (as long as that attack comes before the beginning of your next turn), but causes you to take a â2 penalty to AC against that opponent until your next turn. The dodge bonus against the designated opponentâs attacks persists even if your allies move away from you.
